texto: Writing is like sausage making in my view
autor: you'll all be happier in the end if you just eat the final product without knowing what's gone into it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a you'll all be happier in the end if you just eat the final product without knowing what's gone into it.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Writing is like sausage making in my view” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, george-r-r-martin, writing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
